passives.name: Blind Immunity
passives.desc: The wearer cannot be Blinded.

passives.desc: When you roll 2 or less with this weapon's damage die, reroll it and take the new result.

passives.name: Poisonous Synergy

passives.name: Sweet Bloodletting
passives.desc: Possibly inflict Bleeding when hitting a creature with this weapon while Hiding or Invisible.

passives.name: Absolute's Bane
passives.desc: On a hit with a weapon attack, possibly inflict a -1d4 penalty to the target's Attack Rolls and Saving Throws.

passives.name: Volo's Ersatz Eye
passives.desc: The damage wrought upon your ocular nerve during Volo's experiment is undone, allowing you to see Invisible creatures.

passives.name: Helm's Protection
passives.desc: When you heal another creature, it gains resistance against Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage dealt by weapon attacks.

passives.name: Order of Nature
passives.desc: Undead creatures that hit the wearer receive 1d6 Radiant. Beasts that hit the wearer deal an additional 1d6 Radiant.

passives.name: Spider Step
passives.desc: Immune to being Enwebbed. Your movement speed is not affected by web surfaces.

passives.name: Poison Trails
passives.desc: When the wearer casts a spell that deals Poison damage, it deals an additional 1d4 Poison.

passives.name: Absolute's Ward
passives.desc: If the wielder bears the Absolute's Brand, they gain a +1 bonus to Saving Throws.

passives.name: Absolute's Mercy
passives.desc: If the wearer bears the Absolute's Brand, they have Advantage on Death Saving Throws.

passives.name: Stealthy
passives.desc: Gain a +1 bonus to Stealth Checks.

passives.desc: Makes it easier for the wearer to succeed Death Saving Throws.

passives.name: Part of the Flock
passives.desc: Auntie Ethel welcomes you, dearie.

passives.name: Night Walker
passives.desc: Can't be Enwebbed, Entangled, or Ensnared and can't slip on grease or ice.

passives.name: Cleansing Touch
passives.desc: If the wearer heals a Poisoned creature, it is no longer Poisoned.

passives.name: Shelter

passives.desc: You restore an additional 2 every time you heal another creature.

passives.name: Swathed in Shadow
passives.desc: While Obscured by shadow, the wearer gains +1 to Saving Throws when attacked.

passives.name: Nightsinger's Reply
passives.desc: While Obscured by shadow, the wearer deals 1d4 Necrotic to attackers that hit them with a melee attack.

passives.name: Absolute's Tempest
passives.desc: If the wearer bears the Absolute's Brand, they deal 1 additional Thunder damage with Thunder damage spells and attacks.

passives.name: Blessed Mercy
passives.desc: When you heal a creature, it gains a +1d4 bonus to Attack Rolls and Saving Throws for 2 turns.

passives.name: Nature's Vengeance
passives.desc: When the wearer stands in certain surfaces (such as fire) and casts a spell that deals damage, the target also suffers the surface's effects.

passives.name: Piercing Counter
passives.desc: When the wearer has 50% hit points or less and is damaged by a melee attack, they deal 1d4 Piercing to the attacker.

passives.name: Loving Protection
passives.desc: Once per Short Rest, if you are below 50% hit points and take damage, you gain 8 temporary hit points.

passives.name: Burst of Speed
passives.desc: When the wearer has 50% hit points or less, their movement speed is increased by 3 m.

passives.name: Chilling Grace
passives.desc: When the wearer has 50% hit points or less, they have Fire Resistance.

passives.name: Writhing Dance
passives.desc: When the wearer has 50% hit points or less, they don't provoke Opportunity Attacks.

passives.name: Grit
passives.desc: When the wearer has 50% hit points or less, they have an additional bonus action.

passives.name: Strength in Suffering
passives.desc: Non-Cantrip spells deal an additional 1d4 Force damage when the wearer drops to half their hit points or lower.

passives.name: Burning Fury
passives.desc: When dealing Fire damage, the wearer deals an additional 1 Fire.

passives.name: Hot Little Hands
passives.desc: When the wearer deals Fire damage, the target must succeed a Constitution Saving Throw or begin Burning.

passives.name: Fiery Return
passives.desc: When you deal Fire damage with a levelled spell, you Burn yourself and gain an additional bonus action this round.

passives.name: Cautious Healer
passives.desc: When the wearer heals a creature, it automatically Disengages and won't trigger Opportunity Attacks.

passives.name: Crowning Glory
passives.desc: When healing another, the wearer regains 1d6.

passives.name: Venomous Revenge
passives.desc: Whenever the wearer is healed, their weapon becomes coated in magic and deals an additional 1d6 Poison.

passives.name: The Comeback
passives.desc: When the wearer heals a target, it gains an additional 3 temporary hit points.

passives.name: Personal Space
passives.desc: After shoving an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 to their Armour Class until their next turn.

passives.name: Ever Vigilant
passives.desc: When the wearer chooses to End their Rage, they gain 15 temporary hit points.

passives.name: Swift Strides
passives.desc: When the wearer Dashes or takes a similar action during combat, they gain Momentum for 3 turns.

passives.name: Smooth Start
passives.desc: At the start of combat, the wearer gains Momentum for 3 turns.

passives.name: Sprint
passives.desc: Once per turn, the wearer can reduce the duration of their Momentum by 1 turn to Sprint.

passives.name: Frantic Urgency
passives.desc: During combat, when the wearer starts their turn with 50% hit points or less, they gain Momentum for 1 turn.

passives.name: Running Jump
passives.desc: Once per turn, after the wearer Dashes or takes a similar action, they can Jump without using a bonus action.

passives.name: Grievous Retribution
passives.desc: When an enemy damages the wearer, the wearer gains Wrath for 1 turn.

passives.name: Last Stand
passives.desc: During combat, when the wearer starts their turn with 50% hit points or less, they gain Wrath for 2 turns.
